0.text: Scarring changes in the posterobasal and laterobasal segments of the right lower lobe

1.text: Scarring changes in the apices of both lungs

2.text: Focal ground-glass opacities measuring 8x6 mm in a peripheral subpleural location in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Focal ground-glass opacities measuring 8x6 mm in a peripheral subpleural location in the anterior segment of the right lower lobe
